title.en: Lightning, hotel security and spying - issues England face in Mexico
title.zh-CN: 闪电、酒店安全和间谍活动--英格兰在墨西哥面临的问题

summary.en: England are booed as they arrive at their Mexico City hotel to prepare for their World Cup last-16 game against Mexico - and it's not the only issue they face.
summary.zh-CN: 英格兰队在抵达墨西哥城酒店为世界杯最后16场对阵墨西哥的比赛做准备时受到嘘声-这不是他们面临的唯一问题。

title.en: Five and a half hours that left England's World Cup tie in chaos
title.zh-CN: 让英格兰世界杯比赛陷入混乱的五个半小时

summary.en: For several hours on Friday, no-one seemed to know when England's World Cup last-16 match against co-hosts Mexico would kick off. BBC Sport tells how a story of confusion and anger - culminating in a...
summary.zh-CN: 在周五的几个小时里，似乎没有人知道英格兰世界杯最后16场对阵墨西哥的联合主办方的比赛何时开始。BBC Sport讲述了一个困惑和愤怒的故事，最终导致……

title.en: Farewell Cape Verde - the underdogs the World Cup will never forget
title.zh-CN: 告别佛得角-世界杯的失败者将永远不会忘记

summary.en: Cape Verde may have been the World Cup's second-smallest nation but they leave the largest impact as they depart following defeat by defending champions Argentina in an epic.
summary.zh-CN: 佛得角可能是世界杯第二小的国家，但由于他们在卫冕冠军阿根廷的史诗般失利后离开，他们留下了最大的影响。

title.en: Argentina overcome Cape Verde in extra-time thriller
title.zh-CN: 阿根廷在加时惊悚片中战胜佛得角

summary.en: Argentina overcome a huge scare as they beat Cape Verde 3-2 in extra time thanks to a deflected header from Cristian Romero to advance to the last 16.
summary.zh-CN: 阿根廷克服了巨大的恐慌，因为他们在加时赛中以3比2击败佛得角，这要归功于克里斯蒂安·罗梅罗（ Cristian Romero ）的偏转头球晋级到最后16

title.en: Oxlade-Chamberlain signs new one-year Celtic deal
title.zh-CN: Oxlade-Chamberlain签署为期一年的凯尔特人新协议

summary.en: England-capped midfielder Alex Oxlade-Chamberlain signs a new one-year contract with Celtic.
summary.zh-CN: 英格兰顶级中场球员Alex Oxlade-Chamberlain与凯尔特人队签订了一份为期一年的新合同。

title.en: Eight of the 10 most populous countries are not in the World Cup
title.zh-CN: 人口最多的10个国家中有8个没有参加世界杯

summary.en: Many countries with massive populations consistently miss out on football’s biggest party. What can they do to change their sporting fortunes?
summary.zh-CN: 许多人口众多的国家一直错过足球界最大的派对。他们可以做些什么来改变他们的运动命运？

title.en: 'Sensational' Messi finish gives Argentina the lead
title.zh-CN: “耸人听闻”的梅西决赛让阿根廷领先

summary.en: Lionel Messi hits Argentina's opening goal against Cape Verde with a "sensational" finish in Miami, as he scores in an eighth consecutive World Cup game.
summary.zh-CN: 莱昂内尔·梅西（ Lionel Messi ）在迈阿密以“耸人听闻”的成绩击中了阿根廷对佛得角的首个进球，他在连续第八场世界杯比赛中得分。

title.en: 'What a strike!' - Cabral hits brilliant goal to draw Cape Verde level in extra time
title.zh-CN: “真是一场罢工！” -卡布拉尔达到了加时拉平佛得角的辉煌目标

summary.en: Sidny Cabral scores an incredible goal in extra time for Cape Verde as they equalise for a second time against Argentina.
summary.zh-CN: 西德尼·卡布拉尔（ Sidny Cabral ）在加时赛中为佛得角队打进了一个令人难以置信的进球，因为他们第二次对阵阿根廷队。

title.en: Argentina stunned as Duarte equalises for Cape Verde
title.zh-CN: 阿根廷震惊，杜阿尔特为佛得角扳平比分

summary.en: Deroy Duarte stuns Argentina as he equalises for Cape Verde during their World Cup round of 32 match in Miami.
summary.zh-CN: 德罗伊·杜阿尔特（ Deroy Duarte ）在迈阿密举行的世界杯32轮比赛中为佛得角扳平比分，震惊了阿根廷。

title.en: World Cup quiz: How well do you remember the last 32?
title.zh-CN: 世界杯测验：您对过去32场比赛的记忆力如何？

summary.en: The World Cup's last-32 ties were decided in a busy six-day spell. But how closely were you paying attention?
summary.zh-CN: 世界杯的最后32场比赛是在为期六天的忙碌中决定的。但你有多注意？

title.en: England-Mexico 1am kick-off unchanged after Fifa U-turn
title.zh-CN: 国际足联U形转弯后，英格兰-墨西哥凌晨1点开球保持不变

summary.en: England's World Cup last-16 tie against Mexico will kick off as scheduled at 01:00 BST on Monday.
summary.zh-CN: 英格兰世界杯16强对阵墨西哥的比赛将于英国夏令时周一凌晨1点如期拉开帷幕。

title.en: Martinez restores Argentina's lead against Cape Verde
title.zh-CN: 马丁内斯恢复阿根廷对佛得角的领先优势

summary.en: Lisandro Martinez restores Argentina's lead against Cape Verde in the knockout stage of the 2026 World Cup.
summary.zh-CN: 利桑德罗·马丁内斯在2026年世界杯淘汰赛阶段恢复了阿根廷对佛得角的领先优势。

title.en: England into last 16 - what is their path to the final?
title.zh-CN: 英格兰队进入16强-他们进入决赛的道路是什么？

summary.en: BBC Sport takes a look at what England will need to do to reach the final after progressing the last 16
summary.zh-CN: 英国广播公司体育台（ BBC Sport ）了解英格兰队在晋级16强后需要做些什么才能进入决赛

title.en: England vs Mexico WILL kick-off at 1am Monday - but storm threat remains
title.zh-CN: 英格兰对墨西哥将于周一凌晨1点开球-但风暴威胁仍然存在

summary.en: England's World Cup last-16 tie with Mexico will remain a 1am kick-off on Monday after confusion over a possible time move, but fears remain about predicted thunderstorms in the area.
summary.zh-CN: 英格兰世界杯与墨西哥的最后16场比赛将在周一凌晨1点开球，此前人们对可能的时间变化感到困惑，但人们仍然担心该地区会出现雷暴。

summary.en: Argentina avoided the biggest upset in World Cup history after Diney Borges' own-goal in extra-time rescued a 3-2 win over Cape Verde to book their place in the last 16 of the tournament.

title.en: Rice likely to be available for England v Mexico

summary.en: Declan Rice is likely to be available to start England's World Cup tie against Mexico despite an ongoing injury issue.

summary.en: Tickets originally bought by England fans for the World Cup last-16 game against Mexico are relisted for thousands of pounds on Fifa's official resale portal.
